title: tool.v1
description: A tool descriptor — the cred-governance spine. Declares a capability the unit may use, the credential it needs (as a SecretsPort REFERENCE, never a value), how it attaches (MCP or builtin), whether the unit may call it freely (auto) or only with per-call human approval (gate), and the governance barriers it carries. The unit's scoped toolbelt (unit.v1.tools) is the allow-set; auto tools enter --allowedTools, gate tools hold the turn for an approval surfaced as a proactive-card.v1 action. Governance (MNPI/info-barrier/air-gap) is enforced HERE + the sandbox layer, not in the model.

scope.description: capability string → maps to --allowedTools, e.g. send:self

grant.description: auto = call freely; gate = per-call human approval

cred_ref.description: a SecretsPort reference, e.g. secret://gmail/oauth — NEVER a value (P15)

mcp_server.description: the MCP server id when transport=mcp

barriers.description: governance tags enforced at the cred+sandbox layer, e.g. mnpi, info-barrier
